nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Fires every 6h once activated. Per-lead behavioral scan across §35 categories. Mirrors clx-signal-ingestion-v1 architecture but per-lead scope instead of platform-wide. Writes raw signals to behavioral_signals with relevance_score=NULL — Behavioral Intelligence (A2) classifier picks them up via idx_bs_unclassified. Universal multi-vertical: filters by client.niche_name.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_lead_id: $json.lead_id, p_client_id: $json.client_id, p_signal_type: $json.signal_type, p_signal_category: $json.signal_category, p_niche_name: $json.niche_name, p_signal_data: $json.signal_data, p_signal_source: $json.signal_source, p_relevance_score: null, p_sensitivity_level: $json.sensitivity_level, p_expires_at: null }) }}

nodes.name: Insert Signal (RPC)
nodes.notes: Calls record_behavioral_signal RPC which is consent-gated. Returns NULL silently if the client hasn't opted in to this signal_category (signal_subscriptions). NULL = no insert; not an error. Caller should not treat NULL as failure.
